content:
# Brinell

**Summary**: A mechanical test used to measure the hardness of a material by indenting it with a steel ball.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] used Brinell hardness testing to quantify the resistance of rocks to indentation.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Brinell hardness was used as a primary metric for assessing the hardening effect of chemical additives. ([[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022, p. 40]])
